name: EdwDmProvDirDmFcltyTypExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT FCLTY_TYP_CD, FCLTY_TYP_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.FCLTY_TYP_D WHERE FCLTY_TYP_SK NOT IN (0,1)) SELECT FCLTY_TYP_CD, FCLTY_TYP_NM, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.LastUpdtDt}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DT FROM cte_main
